name: Shape-Based ROI Filtering and Curation
description: You are a microbiologist needing to isolate specific cell morphologies. Using the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image, identify and isolate highly circular particles (Circularity >= 0.85) representing single cells while excluding irregular clumps. Record measurements for Circularity and Area for these particles. Save the isolated regions of interest (ROIs) to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/circular_rois.zip and the corresponding measurements to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/filtered_measurements.csv.
